item.title: Kia America, Inc.: ENGINE AND ENGINE COOLING:ENGINE:HARD PARTS INTERNAL/MECHANICAL Recall (2024 kia telluride)
item.summary: Kia America, Inc. (Kia) is recalling certain 2024 Telluride vehicles. The engine valve springs may break while driving, which can result in a loss of drive power and possibly create a hole in the engine block.
item.affectedPeople: A loss of drive power increases the risk of a crash. A hole in the engine block increases the risk of a fire.
item.remedy: Dealers will replace the engine sub-assembly, free of charge. Owner notification letters were mailed April 5, 2024. Owners may contact Kia customer service at 1-800-333-4542. Kia's number for this recall is SC296.
item.payoutAmount: Free repair, remedy, software update, or dealer service if stated by the NHTSA recall
